text: Practically trained people are in trouble due to the combination of work and informal care. [Analysis](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/analyses/index.html). [Cross-sector](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/alle-sectoren/index.html). 18/09/2025 • 7 minutes reading. [Nehreen Al-Mahmoedi](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/authors/nehreen-al-mahmoedi/index.html). [David Bolscher](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/authors/david-bolscher/index.html). More and more working Dutch people will have to provide informal care. Caring for someone is especially challenging for those with a practical education, because their working hours and conditions are relatively inflexible. ABN AMRO estimates that the number of working informal caregivers who have been practically trained will increase to 1.1 million people by 2040. Employers must focus on flexibility to retain and support the scarce workforce.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: More and more working Dutch people will have to provide informal care. Caring for someone is especially challenging for those with a practical education, because their working hours and conditions are relatively inflexible. ABN AMRO estimates that the number of working informal caregivers who have been practically trained will increase to 1.1 million people by 2040. Employers must focus on flexibility to retain and support the scarce workforce. The aging population and the resulting staff shortages in healthcare will not only affect those in need of care and healthcare providers.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: Caring for someone is especially challenging for those with a practical education, because their working hours and conditions are relatively inflexible. ABN AMRO estimates that the number of working informal caregivers who have been practically trained will increase to 1.1 million people by 2040. Employers must focus on flexibility to retain and support the scarce workforce. The aging population and the resulting staff shortages in healthcare will not only affect those in need of care and healthcare providers. More and more Dutch people, with or without a job, will have to take on care tasks.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: ABN AMRO estimates that the number of working informal caregivers who have been practically trained will increase to 1.1 million people by 2040. Employers must focus on flexibility to retain and support the scarce workforce. The aging population and the resulting staff shortages in healthcare will not only affect those in need of care and healthcare providers. More and more Dutch people, with or without a job, will have to take on care tasks. Giving or receiving informal care will become a reality for more and more Dutch people due to the aging of the population.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: Employers must focus on flexibility to retain and support the scarce workforce. The aging population and the resulting staff shortages in healthcare will not only affect those in need of care and healthcare providers. More and more Dutch people, with or without a job, will have to take on care tasks. Giving or receiving informal care will become a reality for more and more Dutch people due to the aging of the population. Informal caregivers are, according to the definition of the Social and Cultural Planning Office (SCP), people from the social network of a person in need of care who do not provide help to someone with health problems in the context of a profession.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: The aging population and the resulting staff shortages in healthcare will not only affect those in need of care and healthcare providers. More and more Dutch people, with or without a job, will have to take on care tasks. Giving or receiving informal care will become a reality for more and more Dutch people due to the aging of the population. Informal caregivers are, according to the definition of the Social and Cultural Planning Office (SCP), people from the social network of a person in need of care who do not provide help to someone with health problems in the context of a profession. This can vary from providing emotional support and doing household chores and helping with personal care to carrying out nursing procedures.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: More and more Dutch people, with or without a job, will have to take on care tasks. Giving or receiving informal care will become a reality for more and more Dutch people due to the aging of the population. Informal caregivers are, according to the definition of the Social and Cultural Planning Office (SCP), people from the social network of a person in need of care who do not provide help to someone with health problems in the context of a profession. This can vary from providing emotional support and doing household chores and helping with personal care to carrying out nursing procedures. The [National Institute for Public Health and the Environment (RIVM)](https://www.rivm.nl/nieuws/groeiende-vragen-naar-mantelzorg-komen-steeds-vaker-neer-op-mantelzorger-met-werk) expects that the number of working informal caregivers will increase.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: Giving or receiving informal care will become a reality for more and more Dutch people due to the aging of the population. Informal caregivers are, according to the definition of the Social and Cultural Planning Office (SCP), people from the social network of a person in need of care who do not provide help to someone with health problems in the context of a profession. This can vary from providing emotional support and doing household chores and helping with personal care to carrying out nursing procedures. The [National Institute for Public Health and the Environment (RIVM)](https://www.rivm.nl/nieuws/groeiende-vragen-naar-mantelzorg-komen-steeds-vaker-neer-op-mantelzorger-met-werk) expects that the number of working informal caregivers will increase. In 2021, 1.8 million people combined work and informal care, and this number is expected to rise to 2.1 million by 2040.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: Informal caregivers are, according to the definition of the Social and Cultural Planning Office (SCP), people from the social network of a person in need of care who do not provide help to someone with health problems in the context of a profession. This can vary from providing emotional support and doing household chores and helping with personal care to carrying out nursing procedures. The [National Institute for Public Health and the Environment (RIVM)](https://www.rivm.nl/nieuws/groeiende-vragen-naar-mantelzorg-komen-steeds-vaker-neer-op-mantelzorger-met-werk) expects that the number of working informal caregivers will increase. In 2021, 1.8 million people combined work and informal care, and this number is expected to rise to 2.1 million by 2040. This increase can be explained by an increase in the retirement age and the expectation that more women, who traditionally take on the majority of informal care, are working.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: This can vary from providing emotional support and doing household chores and helping with personal care to carrying out nursing procedures. The [National Institute for Public Health and the Environment (RIVM)](https://www.rivm.nl/nieuws/groeiende-vragen-naar-mantelzorg-komen-steeds-vaker-neer-op-mantelzorger-met-werk) expects that the number of working informal caregivers will increase. In 2021, 1.8 million people combined work and informal care, and this number is expected to rise to 2.1 million by 2040. This increase can be explained by an increase in the retirement age and the expectation that more women, who traditionally take on the majority of informal care, are working. In its estimate, the RIVM does not take into account the growth in the number of people needing informal care.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: The [National Institute for Public Health and the Environment (RIVM)](https://www.rivm.nl/nieuws/groeiende-vragen-naar-mantelzorg-komen-steeds-vaker-neer-op-mantelzorger-met-werk) expects that the number of working informal caregivers will increase. In 2021, 1.8 million people combined work and informal care, and this number is expected to rise to 2.1 million by 2040. This increase can be explained by an increase in the retirement age and the expectation that more women, who traditionally take on the majority of informal care, are working. In its estimate, the RIVM does not take into account the growth in the number of people needing informal care. The SCP calculated that the number of people over 75 requiring care will increase by as much as 70 percent by 2040.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: In 2021, 1.8 million people combined work and informal care, and this number is expected to rise to 2.1 million by 2040. This increase can be explained by an increase in the retirement age and the expectation that more women, who traditionally take on the majority of informal care, are working. In its estimate, the RIVM does not take into account the growth in the number of people needing informal care. The SCP calculated that the number of people over 75 requiring care will increase by as much as 70 percent by 2040. For working informal caregivers, this means that the pressure on them will probably increase further, or that more working informal caregivers will be needed than expected.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text:
This increase can be explained by an increase in the retirement age and the expectation that more women, who traditionally take on the majority of informal care, are working. In its estimate, the RIVM does not take into account the growth in the number of people needing informal care. The SCP calculated that the number of people over 75 requiring care will increase by as much as 70 percent by 2040. For working informal caregivers, this means that the pressure on them will probably increase further, or that more working informal caregivers will be needed than expected. Combining a job with informal care is a challenge for both employees and employers, according to an earlier analysis by ABN AMRO. [Read also: More pressure on informal care is also a concern for employers](/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/alle-sectoren/meer-druk-op-mantelzorg-ook-een-zorg-voor-werkgever.html)
Combination extra difficult for workers with practical training.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text:
In its estimate, the RIVM does not take into account the growth in the number of people needing informal care. The SCP calculated that the number of people over 75 requiring care will increase by as much as 70 percent by 2040. For working informal caregivers, this means that the pressure on them will probably increase further, or that more working informal caregivers will be needed than expected. Combining a job with informal care is a challenge for both employees and employers, according to an earlier analysis by ABN AMRO. [Read also: More pressure on informal care is also a concern for employers](/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/alle-sectoren/meer-druk-op-mantelzorg-ook-een-zorg-voor-werkgever.html)
Combination extra difficult for workers with practical training. Working informal caregivers in particular who have been practically trained face an additional challenge: providing informal care under working conditions characterized by inflexibility, mandatory physical presence and relatively less financial compensation and space.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text:
The SCP calculated that the number of people over 75 requiring care will increase by as much as 70 percent by 2040. For working informal caregivers, this means that the pressure on them will probably increase further, or that more working informal caregivers will be needed than expected. Combining a job with informal care is a challenge for both employees and employers, according to an earlier analysis by ABN AMRO. [Read also: More pressure on informal care is also a concern for employers](/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/alle-sectoren/meer-druk-op-mantelzorg-ook-een-zorg-voor-werkgever.html)
Combination extra difficult for workers with practical training. Working informal caregivers in particular who have been practically trained face an additional challenge: providing informal care under working conditions characterized by inflexibility, mandatory physical presence and relatively less financial compensation and space. These limitations make it more difficult to provide help when needed, while illness is associated with unexpected situations.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text:
For working informal caregivers, this means that the pressure on them will probably increase further, or that more working informal caregivers will be needed than expected. Combining a job with informal care is a challenge for both employees and employers, according to an earlier analysis by ABN AMRO. [Read also: More pressure on informal care is also a concern for employers](/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/alle-sectoren/meer-druk-op-mantelzorg-ook-een-zorg-voor-werkgever.html)
Combination extra difficult for workers with practical training. Working informal caregivers in particular who have been practically trained face an additional challenge: providing informal care under working conditions characterized by inflexibility, mandatory physical presence and relatively less financial compensation and space. These limitations make it more difficult to provide help when needed, while illness is associated with unexpected situations. Many practically trained people perform jobs that mainly require physical skills and perform practical actions, such as car mechanics, carpenters, hairdressers, nurses and cooks.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text:
Combining a job with informal care is a challenge for both employees and employers, according to an earlier analysis by ABN AMRO. [Read also: More pressure on informal care is also a concern for employers](/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/alle-sectoren/meer-druk-op-mantelzorg-ook-een-zorg-voor-werkgever.html)
Combination extra difficult for workers with practical training. Working informal caregivers in particular who have been practically trained face an additional challenge: providing informal care under working conditions characterized by inflexibility, mandatory physical presence and relatively less financial compensation and space. These limitations make it more difficult to provide help when needed, while illness is associated with unexpected situations. Many practically trained people perform jobs that mainly require physical skills and perform practical actions, such as car mechanics, carpenters, hairdressers, nurses and cooks. These employees are needed in the workplace, which means they cannot perform informal care tasks while at work.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: Working informal caregivers in particular who have been practically trained face an additional challenge: providing informal care under working conditions characterized by inflexibility, mandatory physical presence and relatively less financial compensation and space. These limitations make it more difficult to provide help when needed, while illness is associated with unexpected situations. Many practically trained people perform jobs that mainly require physical skills and perform practical actions, such as car mechanics, carpenters, hairdressers, nurses and cooks. These employees are needed in the workplace, which means they cannot perform informal care tasks while at work. Theoretically trained people often have jobs that require more analytical skills and usually work in office jobs, such as policy advisor, software developer, or researcher.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: These limitations make it more difficult to provide help when needed, while illness is associated with unexpected situations. Many practically trained people perform jobs that mainly require physical skills and perform practical actions, such as car mechanics, carpenters, hairdressers, nurses and cooks. These employees are needed in the workplace, which means they cannot perform informal care tasks while at work. Theoretically trained people often have jobs that require more analytical skills and usually work in office jobs, such as policy advisor, software developer, or researcher. Moreover, theoretically trained people can of course also practice practical jobs, such as a surgeon or a pilot, and practically trained people can also have an office job.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: Many practically trained people perform jobs that mainly require physical skills and perform practical actions, such as car mechanics, carpenters, hairdressers, nurses and cooks. These employees are needed in the workplace, which means they cannot perform informal care tasks while at work. Theoretically trained people often have jobs that require more analytical skills and usually work in office jobs, such as policy advisor, software developer, or researcher. Moreover, theoretically trained people can of course also practice practical jobs, such as a surgeon or a pilot, and practically trained people can also have an office job. A nuance here is that people with practical jobs that require theoretical training often have a better financial position.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: These employees are needed in the workplace, which means they cannot perform informal care tasks while at work. Theoretically trained people often have jobs that require more analytical skills and usually work in office jobs, such as policy advisor, software developer, or researcher. Moreover, theoretically trained people can of course also practice practical jobs, such as a surgeon or a pilot, and practically trained people can also have an office job. A nuance here is that people with practical jobs that require theoretical training often have a better financial position. This makes it easier for them to access external help that eases the burden of informal care.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: Theoretically trained people often have jobs that require more analytical skills and usually work in office jobs, such as policy advisor, software developer, or researcher. Moreover, theoretically trained people can of course also practice practical jobs, such as a surgeon or a pilot, and practically trained people can also have an office job. A nuance here is that people with practical jobs that require theoretical training often have a better financial position. This makes it easier for them to access external help that eases the burden of informal care. Previous research from 2021 by the [RIVM](https://www.rivm.nl/nieuws/groeiende-vragen-naar-mantelzorg-komen-steeds-vaker-neer-op-mantelzorger-met-werk) already emphasized that practically trained workers can less easily count on support.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: Moreover, theoretically trained people can of course also practice practical jobs, such as a surgeon or a pilot, and practically trained people can also have an office job. A nuance here is that people with practical jobs that require theoretical training often have a better financial position. This makes it easier for them to access external help that eases the burden of informal care. Previous research from 2021 by the [RIVM](https://www.rivm.nl/nieuws/groeiende-vragen-naar-mantelzorg-komen-steeds-vaker-neer-op-mantelzorger-met-werk) already emphasized that practically trained workers can less easily count on support. Practically trained people are more likely to deal with job insecurity and flexible contracts.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: A nuance here is that people with practical jobs that require theoretical training often have a better financial position. This makes it easier for them to access external help that eases the burden of informal care. Previous research from 2021 by the [RIVM](https://www.rivm.nl/nieuws/groeiende-vragen-naar-mantelzorg-komen-steeds-vaker-neer-op-mantelzorger-met-werk) already emphasized that practically trained workers can less easily count on support. Practically trained people are more likely to deal with job insecurity and flexible contracts. The less strong employment position of practically trained workers can prevent them from being entitled to care leave, for example.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: This makes it easier for them to access external help that eases the burden of informal care. Previous research from 2021 by the [RIVM](https://www.rivm.nl/nieuws/groeiende-vragen-naar-mantelzorg-komen-steeds-vaker-neer-op-mantelzorger-met-werk) already emphasized that practically trained workers can less easily count on support. Practically trained people are more likely to deal with job insecurity and flexible contracts. The less strong employment position of practically trained workers can prevent them from being entitled to care leave, for example. They also have less autonomy to determine their workplace and working hours; This makes it more difficult to provide help when needed.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: Previous research from 2021 by the [RIVM](https://www.rivm.nl/nieuws/groeiende-vragen-naar-mantelzorg-komen-steeds-vaker-neer-op-mantelzorger-met-werk) already emphasized that practically trained workers can less easily count on support. Practically trained people are more likely to deal with job insecurity and flexible contracts. The less strong employment position of practically trained workers can prevent them from being entitled to care leave, for example. They also have less autonomy to determine their workplace and working hours; This makes it more difficult to provide help when needed. In addition, lower income can make certain resources more inaccessible.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: Practically trained people are more likely to deal with job insecurity and flexible contracts. The less strong employment position of practically trained workers can prevent them from being entitled to care leave, for example. They also have less autonomy to determine their workplace and working hours; This makes it more difficult to provide help when needed. In addition, lower income can make certain resources more inaccessible. This includes the use of private healthcare providers, medical equipment such as a stair lift, or taking unpaid care leave.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: The less strong employment position of practically trained workers can prevent them from being entitled to care leave, for example. They also have less autonomy to determine their workplace and working hours; This makes it more difficult to provide help when needed. In addition, lower income can make certain resources more inaccessible. This includes the use of private healthcare providers, medical equipment such as a stair lift, or taking unpaid care leave. Working less to provide informal care, and therefore getting paid fewer hours, is a greater challenge for those with a lower income.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: They also have less autonomy to determine their workplace and working hours; This makes it more difficult to provide help when needed. In addition, lower income can make certain resources more inaccessible. This includes the use of private healthcare providers, medical equipment such as a stair lift, or taking unpaid care leave. Working less to provide informal care, and therefore getting paid fewer hours, is a greater challenge for those with a lower income. According to the RIVM, more than half, namely 54 percent, of working informal caregivers are not educated, practically trained, or have only completed secondary school.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: In addition, lower income can make certain resources more inaccessible. This includes the use of private healthcare providers, medical equipment such as a stair lift, or taking unpaid care leave. Working less to provide informal care, and therefore getting paid fewer hours, is a greater challenge for those with a lower income. According to the RIVM, more than half, namely 54 percent, of working informal caregivers are not educated, practically trained, or have only completed secondary school. By including the share of practically trained people in RIVM forecasts, ABN AMRO expects that the number of working informal caregivers with practical training will increase to at least 1.1 million people by 2040.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: This includes the use of private healthcare providers, medical equipment such as a stair lift, or taking unpaid care leave. Working less to provide informal care, and therefore getting paid fewer hours, is a greater challenge for those with a lower income. According to the RIVM, more than half, namely 54 percent, of working informal caregivers are not educated, practically trained, or have only completed secondary school. By including the share of practically trained people in RIVM forecasts, ABN AMRO expects that the number of working informal caregivers with practical training will increase to at least 1.1 million people by 2040. This group will likely experience extra challenging circumstances because informal care is difficult to combine with their work for the reasons stated above.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: Working less to provide informal care, and therefore getting paid fewer hours, is a greater challenge for those with a lower income. According to the RIVM, more than half, namely 54 percent, of working informal caregivers are not educated, practically trained, or have only completed secondary school. By including the share of practically trained people in RIVM forecasts, ABN AMRO expects that the number of working informal caregivers with practical training will increase to at least 1.1 million people by 2040. This group will likely experience extra challenging circumstances because informal care is difficult to combine with their work for the reasons stated above. The distinction between men and women is also important to mention.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: According to the RIVM, more than half, namely 54 percent, of working informal caregivers are not educated, practically trained, or have only completed secondary school. By including the share of practically trained people in RIVM forecasts, ABN AMRO expects that the number of working informal caregivers with practical training will increase to at least 1.1 million people by 2040. This group will likely experience extra challenging circumstances because informal care is difficult to combine with their work for the reasons stated above. The distinction between men and women is also important to mention. The majority of informal caregivers are women, so much of the pressure falls on them.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: By including the share of practically trained people in RIVM forecasts, ABN AMRO expects that the number of working informal caregivers with practical training will increase to at least 1.1 million people by 2040. This group will likely experience extra challenging circumstances because informal care is difficult to combine with their work for the reasons stated above. The distinction between men and women is also important to mention. The majority of informal caregivers are women, so much of the pressure falls on them. Inflexibility of the sector affects practically trained employees with informal care tasks.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: This group will likely experience extra challenging circumstances because informal care is difficult to combine with their work for the reasons stated above. The distinction between men and women is also important to mention. The majority of informal caregivers are women, so much of the pressure falls on them. Inflexibility of the sector affects practically trained employees with informal care tasks. The flexibility of the sector in which an informal caregiver works can influence how easily it is to combine work and informal care.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: The distinction between men and women is also important to mention. The majority of informal caregivers are women, so much of the pressure falls on them. Inflexibility of the sector affects practically trained employees with informal care tasks. The flexibility of the sector in which an informal caregiver works can influence how easily it is to combine work and informal care. Data from ABN AMRO's Sectoral Wellbeing Monitor show per sector to what extent an employee has the freedom to determine working hours and take leave.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: The majority of informal caregivers are women, so much of the pressure falls on them. Inflexibility of the sector affects practically trained employees with informal care tasks. The flexibility of the sector in which an informal caregiver works can influence how easily it is to combine work and informal care. Data from ABN AMRO's Sectoral Wellbeing Monitor show per sector to what extent an employee has the freedom to determine working hours and take leave. For example, the real estate, financial services and technology, media & telecom (TMT) sectors offer the greatest freedom in arranging working hours and taking leave.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: Inflexibility of the sector affects practically trained employees with informal care tasks. The flexibility of the sector in which an informal caregiver works can influence how easily it is to combine work and informal care. Data from ABN AMRO's Sectoral Wellbeing Monitor show per sector to what extent an employee has the freedom to determine working hours and take leave. For example, the real estate, financial services and technology, media & telecom (TMT) sectors offer the greatest freedom in arranging working hours and taking leave. Sectors with little freedom in this area are healthcare, transport and logistics, and retail.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: The flexibility of the sector in which an informal caregiver works can influence how easily it is to combine work and informal care. Data from ABN AMRO's Sectoral Wellbeing Monitor show per sector to what extent an employee has the freedom to determine working hours and take leave. For example, the real estate, financial services and technology, media & telecom (TMT) sectors offer the greatest freedom in arranging working hours and taking leave. Sectors with little freedom in this area are healthcare, transport and logistics, and retail. For example, almost half of employees in financial services, for example, can regularly determine their own working hours, while in transport and logistics this only applies to about one in five employees.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: Data from ABN AMRO's Sectoral Wellbeing Monitor show per sector to what extent an employee has the freedom to determine working hours and take leave. For example, the real estate, financial services and technology, media & telecom (TMT) sectors offer the greatest freedom in arranging working hours and taking leave. Sectors with little freedom in this area are healthcare, transport and logistics, and retail. For example, almost half of employees in financial services, for example, can regularly determine their own working hours, while in transport and logistics this only applies to about one in five employees. Logically, a truck driver cannot take an hour off to go to a hospital appointment for a parent in need of care, while an accountant can more easily make up for that missed hour in the evening.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: For example, the real estate, financial services and technology, media & telecom (TMT) sectors offer the greatest freedom in arranging working hours and taking leave. Sectors with little freedom in this area are healthcare, transport and logistics, and retail. For example, almost half of employees in financial services, for example, can regularly determine their own working hours, while in transport and logistics this only applies to about one in five employees. Logically, a truck driver cannot take an hour off to go to a hospital appointment for a parent in need of care, while an accountant can more easily make up for that missed hour in the evening. The freedom to take leave when necessary also contributes to the ability to maintain the combination of work and informal care.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: Sectors with little freedom in this area are healthcare, transport and logistics, and retail. For example, almost half of employees in financial services, for example, can regularly determine their own working hours, while in transport and logistics this only applies to about one in five employees. Logically, a truck driver cannot take an hour off to go to a hospital appointment for a parent in need of care, while an accountant can more easily make up for that missed hour in the evening. The freedom to take leave when necessary also contributes to the ability to maintain the combination of work and informal care. Informal caregivers who do not have this freedom or have it to a lesser extent, for example, call in sick to care for someone else, take vacation days or use unpaid care leave.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: For example, almost half of employees in financial services, for example, can regularly determine their own working hours, while in transport and logistics this only applies to about one in five employees. Logically, a truck driver cannot take an hour off to go to a hospital appointment for a parent in need of care, while an accountant can more easily make up for that missed hour in the evening. The freedom to take leave when necessary also contributes to the ability to maintain the combination of work and informal care. Informal caregivers who do not have this freedom or have it to a lesser extent, for example, call in sick to care for someone else, take vacation days or use unpaid care leave. Research by [Radboud University](https://www.ru.nl/onderzoek/onderzoeksnieuws/mantelzorg-Difficult-te-combineren-met-werk) shows that some working informal caregivers work fewer hours or even stop their work altogether.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: Logically, a truck driver cannot take an hour off to go to a hospital appointment for a parent in need of care, while an accountant can more easily make up for that missed hour in the evening. The freedom to take leave when necessary also contributes to the ability to maintain the combination of work and informal care. Informal caregivers who do not have this freedom or have it to a lesser extent, for example, call in sick to care for someone else, take vacation days or use unpaid care leave. Research by [Radboud University](https://www.ru.nl/onderzoek/onderzoeksnieuws/mantelzorg-Difficult-te-combineren-met-werk) shows that some working informal caregivers work fewer hours or even stop their work altogether. Other working informal caregivers had to change jobs to maintain the combination.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: The freedom to take leave when necessary also contributes to the ability to maintain the combination of work and informal care. Informal caregivers who do not have this freedom or have it to a lesser extent, for example, call in sick to care for someone else, take vacation days or use unpaid care leave. Research by [Radboud University](https://www.ru.nl/onderzoek/onderzoeksnieuws/mantelzorg-Difficult-te-combineren-met-werk) shows that some working informal caregivers work fewer hours or even stop their work altogether. Other working informal caregivers had to change jobs to maintain the combination. Employers must prioritize flexibility to be future-proof.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: Informal caregivers who do not have this freedom or have it to a lesser extent, for example, call in sick to care for someone else, take vacation days or use unpaid care leave. Research by [Radboud University](https://www.ru.nl/onderzoek/onderzoeksnieuws/mantelzorg-Difficult-te-combineren-met-werk) shows that some working informal caregivers work fewer hours or even stop their work altogether. Other working informal caregivers had to change jobs to maintain the combination. Employers must prioritize flexibility to be future-proof. To retain and support the scarce employees who have been practically trained, employers must focus on more flexibility.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: Research by [Radboud University](https://www.ru.nl/onderzoek/onderzoeksnieuws/mantelzorg-Difficult-te-combineren-met-werk) shows that some working informal caregivers work fewer hours or even stop their work altogether. Other working informal caregivers had to change jobs to maintain the combination. Employers must prioritize flexibility to be future-proof. To retain and support the scarce employees who have been practically trained, employers must focus on more flexibility. Employers and employees must work together to find suitable solutions.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: Other working informal caregivers had to change jobs to maintain the combination. Employers must prioritize flexibility to be future-proof. To retain and support the scarce employees who have been practically trained, employers must focus on more flexibility. Employers and employees must work together to find suitable solutions. A number of parts are important in this.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: Employers must prioritize flexibility to be future-proof. To retain and support the scarce employees who have been practically trained, employers must focus on more flexibility. Employers and employees must work together to find suitable solutions. A number of parts are important in this. First of all, open communication about the situation between employer and employee is necessary.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: To retain and support the scarce employees who have been practically trained, employers must focus on more flexibility. Employers and employees must work together to find suitable solutions. A number of parts are important in this. First of all, open communication about the situation between employer and employee is necessary. It demands a lot from an informal caregiver to continually meet new care needs.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: Employers and employees must work together to find suitable solutions. A number of parts are important in this. First of all, open communication about the situation between employer and employee is necessary. It demands a lot from an informal caregiver to continually meet new care needs. Caring for a family member with dementia, for example, often makes it impossible to provide care alone outside certain working hours.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: A number of parts are important in this. First of all, open communication about the situation between employer and employee is necessary. It demands a lot from an informal caregiver to continually meet new care needs. Caring for a family member with dementia, for example, often makes it impossible to provide care alone outside certain working hours. Managers who understand this and think about solutions contribute to reducing over-fatigue and absenteeism, according to research by [Work and Mantelzorg](https://www.werkenmantelzorg.nl/kennisbank/factsheet-effect-steun-werkvloer-op-combi-werk-en-mantelzorg/).

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: First of all, open communication about the situation between employer and employee is necessary. It demands a lot from an informal caregiver to continually meet new care needs. Caring for a family member with dementia, for example, often makes it impossible to provide care alone outside certain working hours. Managers who understand this and think about solutions contribute to reducing over-fatigue and absenteeism, according to research by [Work and Mantelzorg](https://www.werkenmantelzorg.nl/kennisbank/factsheet-effect-steun-werkvloer-op-combi-werk-en-mantelzorg/). Flexible agreements and circumstances play an important role in supporting working informal caregivers.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: It demands a lot from an informal caregiver to continually meet new care needs. Caring for a family member with dementia, for example, often makes it impossible to provide care alone outside certain working hours. Managers who understand this and think about solutions contribute to reducing over-fatigue and absenteeism, according to research by [Work and Mantelzorg](https://www.werkenmantelzorg.nl/kennisbank/factsheet-effect-steun-werkvloer-op-combi-werk-en-mantelzorg/). Flexible agreements and circumstances play an important role in supporting working informal caregivers. The step towards more hybrid working has already been taken by technological developments and was accelerated by the COVID period.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: Caring for a family member with dementia, for example, often makes it impossible to provide care alone outside certain working hours. Managers who understand this and think about solutions contribute to reducing over-fatigue and absenteeism, according to research by [Work and Mantelzorg](https://www.werkenmantelzorg.nl/kennisbank/factsheet-effect-steun-werkvloer-op-combi-werk-en-mantelzorg/). Flexible agreements and circumstances play an important role in supporting working informal caregivers. The step towards more hybrid working has already been taken by technological developments and was accelerated by the COVID period. This trend will only increase in the future.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: Managers who understand this and think about solutions contribute to reducing over-fatigue and absenteeism, according to research by [Work and Mantelzorg](https://www.werkenmantelzorg.nl/kennisbank/factsheet-effect-steun-werkvloer-op-combi-werk-en-mantelzorg/). Flexible agreements and circumstances play an important role in supporting working informal caregivers. The step towards more hybrid working has already been taken by technological developments and was accelerated by the COVID period. This trend will only increase in the future. This means that employers and employees must work together to find creative solutions to combine work and informal care in a sustainable way.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: Flexible agreements and circumstances play an important role in supporting working informal caregivers. The step towards more hybrid working has already been taken by technological developments and was accelerated by the COVID period. This trend will only increase in the future. This means that employers and employees must work together to find creative solutions to combine work and informal care in a sustainable way. On the one hand, this means more flexibility in determining working hours.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: The step towards more hybrid working has already been taken by technological developments and was accelerated by the COVID period. This trend will only increase in the future. This means that employers and employees must work together to find creative solutions to combine work and informal care in a sustainable way. On the one hand, this means more flexibility in determining working hours. Starting an hour earlier or later, or being able to go to a care appointment in between, can make a big difference.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: This trend will only increase in the future. This means that employers and employees must work together to find creative solutions to combine work and informal care in a sustainable way. On the one hand, this means more flexibility in determining working hours. Starting an hour earlier or later, or being able to go to a care appointment in between, can make a big difference. On the other hand, remote work options can provide relief for caregivers.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: This means that employers and employees must work together to find creative solutions to combine work and informal care in a sustainable way. On the one hand, this means more flexibility in determining working hours. Starting an hour earlier or later, or being able to go to a care appointment in between, can make a big difference. On the other hand, remote work options can provide relief for caregivers. There are also ways to provide more help remotely to a person in need of care, for example through technological use such as home automation, such as an alarm button for emergencies, bed sensors that notice whether someone has been out of bed for a long time, or smart medicine dispensers.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: On the one hand, this means more flexibility in determining working hours. Starting an hour earlier or later, or being able to go to a care appointment in between, can make a big difference. On the other hand, remote work options can provide relief for caregivers. There are also ways to provide more help remotely to a person in need of care, for example through technological use such as home automation, such as an alarm button for emergencies, bed sensors that notice whether someone has been out of bed for a long time, or smart medicine dispensers. Employees who have to be physically present for their practical profession can still provide remote assistance and monitor the situation.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: Starting an hour earlier or later, or being able to go to a care appointment in between, can make a big difference. On the other hand, remote work options can provide relief for caregivers. There are also ways to provide more help remotely to a person in need of care, for example through technological use such as home automation, such as an alarm button for emergencies, bed sensors that notice whether someone has been out of bed for a long time, or smart medicine dispensers. Employees who have to be physically present for their practical profession can still provide remote assistance and monitor the situation. This does require financial resources.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: On the other hand, remote work options can provide relief for caregivers. There are also ways to provide more help remotely to a person in need of care, for example through technological use such as home automation, such as an alarm button for emergencies, bed sensors that notice whether someone has been out of bed for a long time, or smart medicine dispensers. Employees who have to be physically present for their practical profession can still provide remote assistance and monitor the situation. This does require financial resources. Employers can think about the solution by figuring out together how it can be financially covered by the municipality, employee or employer themselves.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: There are also ways to provide more help remotely to a person in need of care, for example through technological use such as home automation, such as an alarm button for emergencies, bed sensors that notice whether someone has been out of bed for a long time, or smart medicine dispensers. Employees who have to be physically present for their practical profession can still provide remote assistance and monitor the situation. This does require financial resources. Employers can think about the solution by figuring out together how it can be financially covered by the municipality, employee or employer themselves. Furthermore, working informal caregivers with practical jobs will benefit from more financial flexibility.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: Employees who have to be physically present for their practical profession can still provide remote assistance and monitor the situation. This does require financial resources. Employers can think about the solution by figuring out together how it can be financially covered by the municipality, employee or employer themselves. Furthermore, working informal caregivers with practical jobs will benefit from more financial flexibility. Being entitled to paid care leave can offer practical trained employees, who often have a lower salary, space.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: This does require financial resources. Employers can think about the solution by figuring out together how it can be financially covered by the municipality, employee or employer themselves. Furthermore, working informal caregivers with practical jobs will benefit from more financial flexibility. Being entitled to paid care leave can offer practical trained employees, who often have a lower salary, space. This way they can continue to work for an employer, make ends meet financially, and provide informal care to a sick family member.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: Employers can think about the solution by figuring out together how it can be financially covered by the municipality, employee or employer themselves. Furthermore, working informal caregivers with practical jobs will benefit from more financial flexibility. Being entitled to paid care leave can offer practical trained employees, who often have a lower salary, space. This way they can continue to work for an employer, make ends meet financially, and provide informal care to a sick family member. Previously, the [Social-Economic Council (SER)](https://www.ser.nl/nl/Publicaties/balans-maatschappelijk-vakantie) already advised the cabinet to include informal care in the leave scheme under the heading 'Care for loved ones', given the social importance of informal caregivers.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: Furthermore, working informal caregivers with practical jobs will benefit from more financial flexibility. Being entitled to paid care leave can offer practical trained employees, who often have a lower salary, space. This way they can continue to work for an employer, make ends meet financially, and provide informal care to a sick family member. Previously, the [Social-Economic Council (SER)](https://www.ser.nl/nl/Publicaties/balans-maatschappelijk-vakantie) already advised the cabinet to include informal care in the leave scheme under the heading 'Care for loved ones', given the social importance of informal caregivers. The SER is also working on advice to the government about supporting working informal caregivers.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: Being entitled to paid care leave can offer practical trained employees, who often have a lower salary, space. This way they can continue to work for an employer, make ends meet financially, and provide informal care to a sick family member. Previously, the [Social-Economic Council (SER)](https://www.ser.nl/nl/Publicaties/balans-maatschappelijk-vakantie) already advised the cabinet to include informal care in the leave scheme under the heading 'Care for loved ones', given the social importance of informal caregivers. The SER is also working on advice to the government about supporting working informal caregivers. Employers, where practically trained employees are essential, must take into account the position of working informal caregivers.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: This way they can continue to work for an employer, make ends meet financially, and provide informal care to a sick family member. Previously, the [Social-Economic Council (SER)](https://www.ser.nl/nl/Publicaties/balans-maatschappelijk-vakantie) already advised the cabinet to include informal care in the leave scheme under the heading 'Care for loved ones', given the social importance of informal caregivers. The SER is also working on advice to the government about supporting working informal caregivers. Employers, where practically trained employees are essential, must take into account the position of working informal caregivers. Inflexibility, location-based work and financial insecurity hinder them from maintaining the combination between work and informal care.

metadata.source_title: Practical trained people in the pinch due to the combination of work and informal care

text: Previously, the [Social-Economic Council (SER)](https://www.ser.nl/nl/Publicaties/balans-maatschappelijk-vakantie) already advised the cabinet to include informal care in the leave scheme under the heading 'Care for loved ones', given the social importance of informal caregivers. The SER is also working on advice to the government about supporting working informal caregivers. Employers, where practically trained employees are essential, must take into account the position of working informal caregivers. Inflexibility, location-based work and financial insecurity hinder them from maintaining the combination between work and informal care. Employers who know how to find flexible solutions together with employees are prepared for the future.
